scripts.docs:build: rm -rf public .tmp/sphinx-doctrees && python -m sphinx -b html -d .tmp/sphinx-doctrees -W --keep-going docs public/docs
scripts.docs:prepare: npm run docs:install && npm run docs:build
scripts.deploy:production: npm run docs:prepare && npx --yes wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && npx --yes wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run docs:prepare && npx --yes wrangler versions upload
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run audit:high
